_description: Vital City Flourish theme settings. Paste these into the Preview > Settings panel of any Flourish visualization, or save as an account-level custom theme in Flourish Enterprise. Values are extracted from published Vital City Flourish charts (Dec 2025 / Apr 2026).

_notes.series_order: Place the focal subject in series 1 so it gets Safety Orange. If NYC is being compared to other cities, override series 1 to Magenta (#e7466d) and series 2 to Cerulean (#217ebe) via the per-series color override.
_notes.gridlines: Keep horizontal gridlines at #dddddd, 1px; omit vertical gridlines where possible.
_notes.trend_lines: For combo bar+line charts, set the line to Safety Orange with direct data labels in the same color.
_notes.annotations: Use dotted vertical lines (1px dotted #050507) with rotated text for contextual events (e.g., 'pandemic').
_notes.source_line: Always include; start with 'Source: ' and link dataset names where possible. Include methodological notes inline (e.g., '2025 is year-to-date through 12/07').
_notes.logo: Do not paste the VITAL CITY logo into the chart if it will render under 20px tall — it becomes an unreadable black bar. Place the logo in the page container, not the chart itself, for web embeds.
